retry_reason: Destructor functions do not retry; the operation is a one-time cleanup.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is destruction of an afs_volume object, involving multiple cleanup steps (detaching from servers, removing from cell, putting server list and cell, tracing, and freeing memory). The function is not primarily a reference-count wrapper; it coordinates various teardown actions with the put calls being part of broader cleanup logic.
